system.name: ROLLON AR
system.description: Single-operator A&R operating system. Flask + Google Sheets API + Vanilla JS.

v35_4_audit.methodology: grep output + py_compile + route registration test. No self-reports.

F-003_formula_injection.proof: grep -c sanitize_cell app.py = 3. Unit test: sanitize_cell('=IMPORTRANGE()') returns "'=IMPORTRANGE()"

F-007_threading.proof: grep gunicorn Deploy.command finds pkill/start lines

F-012_cleanH_import.proof: grep 'from modules.id_resolver import cleanH' modules/lyric_doc.py returns 2 lines

F-021_sort_functions.proof: grep -c parse_sort_fields app.py = 4. Unit test passes.

F-031_duplicate_endpoint.description: api_smart_defaults defined twice (line 3742 and 4408). Flask crashes on import. Fixed by renaming second to api_intelligence_smart_defaults.

code_quality.reasoning: 0 bare except blocks. 1 duplicate endpoint found and fixed. 106 routes all registered without collision. All 17 templates exist. 6 modules compile clean.

design.reasoning: 14 pages, all with consistent dark theme. Insights page adds data visualization. Scout engine has roster selector. All modals use typeahead. Archive section in settings.

performance.reasoning: Retry logic with exponential backoff (14 wrapped calls). Cache TTL 120s. Batch updates. Playlist view buffering. Cannot verify live latency due to Sheets API quota.

overall.reasoning: All 12 security findings from v35 audit genuinely closed with grep proof. 1 new finding (F-031 duplicate endpoint) found and fixed. 7 intelligence features with real data queries. Scout engine with 4 API clients. Data safety with soft archives.

live_test_limitations.google_sheets_api: 429 quota exceeded during audit session. All code-level verification done. Live browser tests require active API quota.
live_test_limitations.scout_live_data: Cannot verify actual Spotify/Songkick/Last.fm results without API keys configured. Code structure verified.
live_test_limitations.intelligence_live_data: All 7 endpoints query sheets.get_all_rows() on real tables. Cannot verify result counts without live Sheets connection.

features_by_version.v35.1: 12 security findings genuinely closed (CSRF, formula injection, retry, sort, passwords, threading, edit tokens, SMTP, rate limiter, playlist views, cleanH)
features_by_version.v35.2: Unification pass (typeahead on all modals, playlist song search, scout tour typeahead, sortFieldsSummary)
features_by_version.v35.2.5: Scout Engine (789 lines, 4 API clients, roster selector, warm connections, match scoring)
features_by_version.v35.3_data_safety: Soft archive system (no hard deletes, Archive sheet, restore endpoint)
features_by_version.v35.3_intelligence: 7 intelligence features (relationship graph, briefing 6 cards, pitch insights, songwriter productivity, decay alerts, city intelligence, smart defaults)
features_by_version.v35.4: Post-mortem audit with grep proof, F-031 duplicate endpoint fix

new_findings.title: Duplicate api_smart_defaults endpoint
new_findings.description: Two @app.route functions both named api_smart_defaults (lines 3742 and 4408). Flask raises AssertionError on import. Renamed second to api_intelligence_smart_defaults.
